ACME CORPORATION

NOTICE OF ANNUAL MEETING OF SHAREHOLDERS

The Annual Meeting of Shareholders will be held on May 22, 2025

The Board of Directors recommends a vote FOR all nominees and proposals.

PROPOSAL 1 — ELECTION OF DIRECTORS

Elect 9 directors to serve until the next annual meeting.

director nominees: 9

For 210,450,000 Against 8,320,000 Abstain 2,100,000 Broker Non-Votes 18,500,000

PROPOSAL 2 — ADVISORY VOTE ON EXECUTIVE COMPENSATION

Say-on-pay advisory vote to approve named executive compensation.

For 195,280,000 Against 22,100,000 Abstain 3,490,000 Broker Non-Votes 18,500,000

PROPOSAL 3 — RATIFICATION OF INDEPENDENT AUDITORS

Ratification of Deloitte & Touche LLP as independent auditors.

For 228,740,000 Against 4,100,000 Abstain 6,530,000

EXECUTIVE COMPENSATION

SUMMARY COMPENSATION TABLE

Name and Principal Position Year Salary ($) Bonus ($) Stock Awards ($) Option Awards ($) Non-Equity Incentive Plan Compensation ($) All Other Compensation ($) Total ($)
